classes.reasoning: Document explicitly identifies itself as 'IB-001 -- Investigator Brochure' in the header and contains comprehensive drug information including physicochemical properties, preclinical pharmacology, clinical studies summary, and benefit-risk assessment—all hallmark sections of an Investigator Brochure.

indication: EGFR-mutant advanced NSCLC following progression on osimertinib
summary: This is Edition 1 of the Investigator Brochure for BRC-471 (Lumitanib), an orally bioavailable dual inhibitor of EGFR and HER2 tyrosine kinases under investigation for EGFR-mutant advanced NSCLC. The document summarizes physicochemical properties, preclinical pharmacology, Phase I clinical study data (BIORCE-ONC-2021-003) showing an ORR of 22% at the RP2D of 200 mg BID, and a favorable benefit-risk assessment for the compound.
references_to: Phase I (BIORCE-ONC-2021-003, n=42, data cut 15 Nov 2022)
